body:
This commit removes the `.dev` folder in order to simplify the repository. Issues with `.dev`:
1. It's undocumented, one has to know it's there
2. It brings in an additional julia environment that needs to be maintained
3. It sees no development and does not benefit from upstream developlment (e.g., `PkgDevTools` provides a superior way to update Manifests)
4. It is not aligned with what the rest of the julia community does

In this commit, I remove `.dev`, add deprecation notes so that users are informed about the change, and add documentation
title: Remove .dev

body: This PR updates the dependencies, except ClimaTimeSteppers (to not interfere with #3545 and #3542).
title: Update dependencies
